This makes creating a podcast very easy, even when participants are remote. Then post-production is also easy whether you're trying do some or all of it yourself or have a professional help. The ability to use AI to clean up pauses, pull out "ums" and other fillers, find the most useful marketing clips, are among some other cool features. Finally, sharing and collaboration features are also very good, as I use this within a team.

results.title: Riverside Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content:
Report

 25 views

•1 review

To be honest, Riverside is a game changer for podcasters. It allows for regular (non-millionaire types) people to produce excellent quality content on par with many big name creators. I mean sure, a small little podcast like Faithful Politics will never be as big as the Jason and Travis Kelce podcast, but the fact that there is a product that is good for both the goose AND the gander must mean something. Appreciate all the wonderful updates and fair pricing!

#### What's great

beginner-friendly (1)time-saving (1)reliable performance (2)high-quality output (2)

Report

 8 views

•1 review

An amazing app streamlining the entire remote recording process, this is so much easier than how we recorded guests before!

Report

 5 views

•2 reviews [...] Report

 8 views

•41 reviews

Riverside is an outstanding platform for recording high-quality podcasts and videos. It offers studio-level audio and video right from your browser, making it incredibly convenient for creators and teams. The interface is user-friendly, recordings are crystal clear, and the local recording feature ensures reliability even with poor internet. Overall, Riverside is a top choice for professional podcasters, interviewers, and content creators who value quality and ease of use.

What do you think? …

Arya
CreateWise AI

CreateWise AI

Hey Product Hunt! 👋 I'm Arya, founder of CreateWise AI , and I'm thrilled to launch the first version of our product!  
  
If you're tired of the hassle and complexity of podcast editing？As a podcaster myself, I know the struggle. 1-hour podcast takes 4+ hours to edit, removing filler words, then generating transcripts, writing show notes and so on. It's really a time killer. I believe creators should focus on genuine creativity, not repetitive tasks.  
That's why I created CreateWise-an AI-powered Podcast Editor, automatically removes filler words, silences, generates show notes, transcripts, and creates highlight clips—all with one click.   
  
⚡️AI Clean Voice [...] Automatically detects and eliminates "um," "uh," awkward pauses, and repetitions

Analyzes and optimizes your audio content, reducing hours of editing work to just minutes.

💿️ AI Episode

Transcripts from your files, YouTube or RSS link

Finds highlights and creates shareable video clips perfect for social media

Generates show notes, titles and summaries

Creates social media posts and blogs for your episodes

Launch Special 🚀 Use PH50 for 50% off (valid until May 31th)  
  
Would love to know your thoughts and any feedback, please share your thoughts with us! Let's chat! 🙌  
  
Cheers,  
Arya
